Localization.Description: Processing of DNS queries and responses

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: Host {src.host} sent a DNS response of "{object.type}" type to host {dst.host} on host {event_src.host}
Error "{reason}" occurred while processing a DNS packet on host {event_src.host}
Host {dst.host} received a DNS query of "{object.type}" type from host {src.host} on host {event_src.host}
